title: Listen to Your Heart
why_this_song: Listen to Your Heart by Roxette (1988) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 29 times; first heard in: "Listen to your heart when he's calling for you"
Appears 23 times; first heard in: "Listen to your heart when he's calling for you"
Appears 9 times; first heard in: "I know there's something in the wake of your smile"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "I don't know where you're going and I don't know why"
Appears 5 times; first heard in: "I know there's something in the wake of your smile"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "listen" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "listen" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "heart" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "heart" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Your little piece of heaven turns to dark
Listen to your heart before, oh

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "Listen to Your Heart" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "Listen to Your Heart" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Listen to Your Heart", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Listen to Your Heart", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Listen to Your Heart" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Listen to Your Heart" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
